overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along a wet city sidewalk at dusk. The player passes a Korean restaurant with traditional architecture and outdoor seating, encountering a pedestrian, then continues toward the downtown Los Santos skyline with the orange sunset sky reflecting off the pavement.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past commercial buildings with the downtown skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: commercial building with distinctive white and green chevron-patterned shutters
traditional Korean-style restaurant building with cream walls and red wooden trim
tall palm trees lining the street
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
elevated highway overpass in the distance
cluster of modern glass and steel skyscrapers forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet urban sidewalk at dusk, passing a building with chevron-patterned shutters on the left and approaching the side of a Korean restaurant building on the right. The downtown skyline is visible in the distance against the orange sunset sky, with street lights beginning to illuminate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: restaurant front with outdoor patio seating

events.description: pedestrian woman appears walking toward camera along the sidewalk
camera turns to face the restaurant entrance directly, revealing the S.Ho signage

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor seating and approaching the restaurant entrance, passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: woman in dress walking toward camera along the sidewalk, passing by at close range

entered.detail: large white patio umbrellas with wooden tables and chairs
red illuminated sign reading 'S.Ho' above the entrance
ornate traditional Korean entrance with red doors and decorative roof
wooden park bench on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking alongside the S.Ho Korean Noodle House, passing outdoor seating with large white umbrellas. A pedestrian woman walks toward the camera and passes by closely. The camera approaches the front entrance with its prominent red signage and traditional Korean architectural details, then turns to continue along the sidewalk.

events.description: S.Ho building exits frame, view opens to full downtown skyline with unobstructed sky

agents.ego_description: walking away from the restaurant toward the downtown skyline with wet pavement reflecting the sunset

entered.detail: large commercial billboard with advertisements on the left side of the road
tall street lamp with illuminated light against the dusk sky
red and yellow branded food truck driving on the adjacent road

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the sidewalk with the S.Ho building receding behind on the left. The view opens up to reveal the full downtown Los Santos skyline ahead against the orange dusk sky. Commercial billboards and street lights line the road, with occasional vehicles including a taco truck passing by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown approach with commercial billboards and construction

events.description: white van and other vehicles pass by on the adjacent multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the downtown skyscrapers with the wet pavement reflecting the orange sunset and street lights

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: construction crane visible among the downtown skyscrapers indicating ongoing development

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wide urban sidewalk with an unobstructed view of the downtown skyscrapers against the deep orange dusk sky. The wet pavement reflects the street lights and sunset colors. Construction cranes are visible among the high-rise buildings, and moderate traffic including vans and cars passes by on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a wet urban sidewalk that transitions from a detailed street-level encounter into a wide, panoramic view of a city skyline at dusk. It begins by passing a building with chevron-patterned shutters and approaching the side of a Korean restaurant, with the distant downtown skyline already glowing against an orange sunset. As the camera moves alongside the S.Ho Korean Noodle House, it passes under large white umbrellas and a pedestrian woman before rounding the front entrance and its prominent red signage. The scene then opens up as the restaurant recedes, revealing a broader vista of commercial billboards and a passing taco truck on the adjacent road. Finally, the view expands to an unobstructed perspective of the Los Santos skyscrapers and construction cranes, while the wet pavement reflects the deep orange sky and shimmering street lights.
